hyperedges.label: Requirements Analysis Pipeline: LLM extracts structured reqs -> saves to Requirement/IOItem/LogicRule models -> pushes WebSocket progress
Component Selection Pipeline: LLM maps categories -> RAG searches knowledge base -> Rule engine validates -> saves BOMItem
ST Code Generation Pipeline: LLM generates ST modules -> saves to STModule -> pushes WebSocket progress
Full Analysis Pipeline: ChatPanel triggers runFullAnalysis which calls api.analyze -> api.runSelection -> api.generateSchematic -> api.generateCode
MVS Canvas Rendering: CanvasPanel (View) reads useStore (Model) to route tabs; ExportToolbar delegates to exportService (Service)
Tiered Confidence Display: BOMTable calls confidenceBadge for rag/llm/mixed levels defined in Component Selection Engine design

nodes.label: Lifespan context manager (table creation on startup)
nodes.norm_label: lifespan context manager (table creation on startup)

nodes.label: EE Assistant Application
nodes.rationale: Targets professional electrical engineers in industrial automation. Siemens S7-1200/S7-1500 first, architecture reserves multi-brand extension. Chat-driven requirements analysis with RAG-based component selection, block-diagram schematics, and PLC ST code generation deployed via Docker Compose.

nodes.label: MVS Architecture Pattern
nodes.rationale: Frontend uses MVS: Models (Zustand store + TypeScript types), Views (React components), Services (API client, WebSocket, export, analysis flow). Separation allows independent testing and clean data flow.

nodes.label: Component Selection Engine
nodes.rationale: Flow: Category Mapping (LLM) -> RAG Search (Qdrant) -> LLM Supplement -> Rule Engine Validation -> BOM Output with tiered confidence. Five hard constraints: breaker rating >= 1.25x load, SIL2+ redundancy, protocol compatibility, voltage matching, motor starter match.

nodes.label: RAG Knowledge Base
nodes.rationale: PDF upload with drag-and-drop, PyMuPDF extraction, smart chunking at section/table boundaries, embedding via text-embedding-3-small, Qdrant vector storage. Tag system: manufacturer, category, model series. Filter by tag first, then semantic search.

nodes.label: Schematic Generation Stage
nodes.rationale: Block-diagram level using Mermaid generation with interactive overlay. LLM generates Mermaid flowchart from BOM + control logic. Frontend renders via react-mermaid with click/tooltip overlay. Export to SVG, PNG, PDF, direct print.

nodes.label: ST Code Generation Stage
nodes.rationale: Output: program structure (FC/FB/OB decomposition), IO mapping table (TIA Portal %I/%Q/%IW/%QW), FC/FB code skeleton. Safety logic always complete (E-Stop, safety door, interlocks). Regular logic: framework + comments. Monaco Editor with ST syntax highlighting and module tree sidebar.
